title: RegenParticles
description: Visualize player health regeneration in a fancy way
body: # ✨ RegenParticles - Healing Just Got Visual! RegenParticles is a lightweight and straightforward Minecraft plugin that enhances your gameplay experience. Every time a player regenerates health, a burst of stunning particles surrounds them, adding a magical visual touch to healing moments! --- ## Features - 🎇 Healing Particles: Automatically spawns particles around players when they regain health. - 🛠️ No Configuration Required: No commands, no config files—just drag, drop, and play! - ⚡ Lightweight and Efficient: Minimal server impact, designed for smooth performance. - 🔑 Permission-Based Control: Only players with the regenparticles.visualize permission will have particles spawned around them. This permission is granted to everyone by default but can be revoked for specific players if needed. --- ## Installation 1. Download the plugin jar file. 2. Place it into your server’s plugins folder. 3. Restart your server, and you're ready to go! 🎉 --- ## Compatibility - The plugin should be compatible with most of the server versions however support is not provided for legacy versions. --- ## Report Issues If you encounter any issues or have suggestions, please visit the [GitHub page](https://github.com/Dreamers-Dev/RegenParticles).
